name: Dragonbone City Styxia
desc:
Any card that would be banished from the hand, Deck, or field is sent to the GY instead.
Each time you lose LP: Place 1 counter on this card for every 1000 LP lost.
Once per turn: You can target 1 monster in your GY; Special Summon it, then you lose LP equal to half its ATK.
You can remove all counters from this card (min. 4); Special Summon 1 "Pollux, Netherwing Husk, Ferry of Souls" from your Extra Deck, and if you do, its original ATK/DEF become the number of counters removed x1000. This effect cannot be negated.
You can only use this effect of "Dragonbone City Styxia" once per turn.
